prompt: scan my codebase for any hand-rolled code that could be replaced by a well-maintained npm package. focus on substantial implementations, not tiny helpers
assertions: The report identifies at least 3 distinct hand-rolled implementations
Each finding includes the file path and line range
Each finding includes a suggested library replacement with npm download stats or GitHub stars
Each finding is rated with a confidence level (High/Medium/Low)
The report has a summary section with total candidates found
Parallel subagents were used to explore the codebase
Web search or Context7 was used to verify at least one library suggestion
The report was saved to a markdown file
